name: East Bay Meditation Center
description: East Bay Meditation Center (EBMC) is a community meditation center in downtown Oakland, California. Founded in 2007, it is dedicated to making meditation accessible to diverse communities, particularly people of color, LGBTQ+ individuals, and those with disabilities. EBMC offers sitting groups, classes, and retreats rooted in Buddhist and other contemplative traditions. All programs operate on a dana (generosity) basis.
